muniCodeNote: amlegal WAF blocks direct WebFetch (HTTP 403 on all attempts). Use city website forms pages and web search snippets as fallback.
fireAgencyAddress: 1303 S. Del Mar Ave., San Gabriel, CA 91776
fireAgencyNote: San Gabriel has its own municipal fire department — NOT LA County Fire. Fire plan check submitted through San Gabriel Fire Prevention Bureau.
wuiNote: No part of San Gabriel is in Moderate, High, or Very High FHSZ. Ord. 719 adopted CalFire LRA FHSZ map. Fire Chief confirmed no WUI designation.
localCodeAmendments: Ord. 686 (November 2022): Adopted 2022 California Building Standards Code with local amendments (Ch. 150 SGMC). Full text blocked by amlegal WAF — operator review recommended.
Ord. 706 (April 16, 2024): ADU ordinance implementing AB 897/AB 2221 (§153.047 SGMC)
Ord. 719: Adopted CalFire LRA FHSZ map — no city parcels in FHSZ
operativeCode: 2025 California Building Standards Code (Title 24, effective January 1, 2026)
solarAppNote: San Gabriel uses SolarAPP+ for expedited residential solar permits
needsHumanReview: Full text of SGMC Ch. 150 local amendments not retrieved (amlegal 403). Structural amendments from LA Basin committee not confirmed. Review Ch. 150 directly before publishing SFR/residential-addition overlays.
